full_text:
Wang Chen 王晨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Chen (王晨)was born in Taiyuan. One of the few members of the Wang family to escape Li Jue’s wrath. Wang Chen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
